name: Mongolic
notes: Classification-only clade node for the Mongolic branch. Carries no phonology: it is never a data-inheritance source, only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived. Glottolog labels this node Mongolic-Khitan (mong1349).

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
